response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrated experience in embedded systems, C programming for UNIX, Linux kernel modification, and network security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, which are core requirements; their background is predominantly in web, mobile, and full-stack development with languages like TypeScript and DLang, and there is no evidence of Japanese language proficiency.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-language development experience
Active open-source contributor with diverse technical projects
Demonstrated ability to build CI/CD infrastructure and developer tooling
concerns: No proven experience with C in embedded or UNIX environments
No evidence of Linux kernel modification or network security protocol implementation
Japanese language proficiency not mentioned — critical requirement
